seoTitle: Possum Creek vs Pottery Estate — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Possum Creek vs Pottery Estate: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Possum Creek and Pottery Estate.
heading: Possum Creek vs Pottery Estate — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Possum Creek, New South Wales and Pottery Estate, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pottery Estate has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Possum Creek (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Possum Creek or Pottery Estate safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Possum Creek has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Pottery Estate scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Possum Creek scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Pottery Estate scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Possum Creek or Pottery Estate?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pottery Estate has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
